params.description: Vertical picture graph appears in building mode. Favorite Playground Equipment data. Swings has 4 symbols (20 votes), Slides has 3 symbols (15 votes). Monkey Bars and Sandbox rows are empty. Key visible: each symbol = 5 votes.
Data table appears alongside graph showing Favorite Playground Equipment values: Swings 20, Slides 15, Monkey Bars 25, Sandbox 18.

beats.text: Monkey Bars has 25. That's a bigger number. Click to set the height of the Monkey Bars.
Set the height for Monkey Bars.

validator.description: Student placed 5 symbols for Monkey Bars, correct

params.description: 5 symbols lock into place in Monkey Bars row.

elements.description: Vertical picture graph in building mode. Favorite Playground Equipment data. Swings has 4 symbols, Slides has 3 symbols, Monkey Bars has 5 symbols. Sandbox row is empty. Key visible: each symbol = 5 votes.
Data table showing Favorite Playground Equipment values alongside the graph.
